description:
Alienware systems lights, fans, and power control tools and apps

AWCC alternative in 500kb. You can control your system lights (including hardware and software effects such as system parameters monitoring, ambient lights, sound haptic), fans, temperatures, power settings, and a lot more.
Important! If you are using tools for the first time, please read Beginner's guide and AlienFX-GUI readme to configure out its concept and operation principle.
Fan-SDK_V1.zip have binaries built against older fan control version, use it only in case you know what you're doing (or have Aurora R7), check readme file inside archive first to configure out how to make it working!
Changes into this release:
All Fan control tools:
- Bug fixed: G-mode error state threaten as G-mode on. As a result, g-mode always reported as on at the systems without G-mode support, providing permanent mode switch each poll, which can result in system microfreeze.
AlienFX-GUI:
- New: At any color selection into app, last custom color in selection dialogue will be system Accent color (added by user request).
- Profile switch logic changed for power source-driven (AC/DC switch) profile check. Now if profile auto-switch off, active profile will not be changed if marked suitable for new power mode.
Known issues:
- For some newer systems, fans acting strange in Manual mode and can not spin up even if boost set below some value. A quick fix is setting boost higher into the curve if you need to spin a fan, but i will check how to do it for any boost value set.
